user_query: I’m refreshing on-page SEO for a small set of local HTML pages for my eco brand. Please audit and optimize them in a way that reflects an inclusive, climate-positive voice and keeps things clear and concise. Inputs: - HTML pages: input/pages/index.html, input/pages/products.html, input/pages/blog.html - Robots file: input/robots.txt - Site config: input/site-config.json Deliverables and output paths: 1) Write updated pages to output/optimized/pages/index.html, output/optimized/pages/products.html, and output/optimized/pages/blog.html with these changes only: - Rewrite the on each page to be 50–60 characters (inclusive), include "Greenswell" or "Greenswell Cooperative", and keep the tone plain-language and inclusive. - Rewrite or insert a <meta name="description"> on each page to be 140–160 characters (inclusive), use one of the preferred_keywords from input/site-config.json, and keep the tone climate-positive and non-hyped. - For every <img> with a missing or empty alt attribute, add a concise descriptive alt (under 80 characters) using surrounding context (e.g., nearby headings); avoid promotional phrases. - Do not change body text beyond adding alt attributes. Preserve existing canonical links if present and do not add canonicals to pages that don’t have them. 2) Create an audit CSV at output/audit/seo_audit.csv with one row per input page and the following columns (in this order): - page (e.g., index.html) - title_before - title_after - title_length_after - meta_description_before (empty if missing) - meta_description_after - meta_description_length_after - h1_present (true/false) - canonical_present (true/false) - img_count_before - img_missing_alt_before - img_missing_alt_after - internal_link_count_before (count <a> whose href ends with .html) - keyword_used_in_description (one value chosen from preferred_keywords that appears in the rewritten meta description) Notes: - "before" values are computed from input/pages/*.html. - "after" values are computed from output/optimized/pages/*.html. 3) Create a summary JSON at output/audit/summary.json with: - total_pages - pages_missing_meta_description_before - avg_title_length_after - avg_meta_description_length_after - total_images_before - total_images_missing_alt_before - total_images_missing_alt_after - robots: { disallow_count, disallows (array of paths), sitemap_present (true/false) } Notes: - Compute robots fields from input/robots.txt. Additional constraints: - Use the brand and preferred keywords from input/site-config.json to guide rewrites. The rewritten meta description must include at least one preferred keyword; the title must include "Greenswell" or the full brand name. - Keep copy inclusive and climate-positive without hype. Make improvements concise and clear. - All path references in the audit should be relative filenames (e.g., index.html, products.html, blog.html). I will evaluate by diffing the updated HTML for the specified changes and by verifying the CSV and JSON metrics against the inputs and outputs. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
